series_metadata.series_description: System Backup Files contain copies of all electronic records, documents, files and information stored on agency servers. They are used as a safeguard to restore office functions and documents in the event of an emergency or system loss. Back up files are to be used only for disaster recovery purposes.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for up to 6 months. ; Microform: Retain for up to 6 months., Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred
